26.1.2.1.3.0: Add Curse Roll feature, increase mob XP reward, fix config screen labels across 8 locales.
26.1.2.1.2.4: Remove dead lang keys; show Curse Roll chance in /alaloot stats.
26.1.2.1.2.3: Add Curse Roll: 5% chance to drop a damaged tool when loot roll fails.
26.1.2.1.2.2: Fix config screen entry labels for all 8 locales.
26.1.2.1.2.1: Increase mob kill XP reward (10 -> 30). Fix config screen translation keys.
26.1.2.1.2.0: Initial public release. See CHANGELOG.md for full notes.

1.21.1.1.3.1: Fix InvalidModFileException on NeoForge 21.1.x: declare modLoader/loaderVersion in mods.toml and ship pack.mcmeta. 1.3.0 backport jar was unloadable — please update.
1.21.1.1.3.0: BROKEN — does not load on NeoForge 21.1.x (missing modLoader declaration). Use 1.3.1 instead.
